repo.description: Voice Conversion With Just Nearest Neighbors

terms.context_snippet: The official code repo! This repo contains training and inference code for kNN-VC -- an any-to-any voice conversion model from our paper, "Voice Conversion With Just k-Nearest Neighbors". The trained checkpoints are available under the 'Releases' tab and through `torch.hub`.

The official code repo! This repo contains training and inference code for kNN-VC -- an any-to-any voice conversion model from our paper, "Voice Conversion With Just k-Nearest Neighbors". The trained checkpoints are available under the 'Releases' tab and through `torch.hub`.

The official code repo! This repo contains training and inference code for kNN-VC -- an any-to-any voice conversion model from our paper, "Voice Conversion With Just k-Nearest Neighbors". The trained checkpoints are available under the 'Releases' tab and through `torch.hub`.
